title: Large Scale Abstract Image Aged Off White
sourceTitle: Large Scale Abstract Image Aged Off White
prompt: Large-scale abstract image with an aged off-white ground covered in layered gestural scribbles, looping cursive marks, and energetic pencil-and-crayon strokes in dark graphite, dusty blue, and sparse red. Marks vary from tight coiled loops to sweeping diagonal slashes, densest at center, thinning toward edges. Raw, childlike yet intellectual urgency. No text unless specifically requested. --ar 1:1 --profile 362c2i1 u1yscdb nj4ajrt pz8oy84 dc6okxb sf5lk2z 9nv6snq eynj9qn klxqom5 fey4r6j 8hhmjfp 5uz2kfv --v 7
